## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Goodcall and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, CMS updates, and performance metrics.](https://fathom.video/share/t8eK-8TFsW-Y6WYR2wuGBvVE4xgCsyV8?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [CMS publication process is ready; 45 articles to be migrated to new CMS with 301 redirects](https://fathom.video/share/t8eK-8TFsW-Y6WYR2wuGBvVE4xgCsyV8?tab=summary&timestamp=200.0)
  - [Content performance shows promising early results: 3000 impressions, 9 clicks in week one](https://fathom.video/share/t8eK-8TFsW-Y6WYR2wuGBvVE4xgCsyV8?tab=summary&timestamp=669.0)
  - [Plans to support programmatic content with blog articles for better indexation and ranking](https://fathom.video/share/t8eK-8TFsW-Y6WYR2wuGBvVE4xgCsyV8?tab=summary&timestamp=1011.0)
  - [Enterprise section of the site needs refinement; multiple layout options under consideration](https://fathom.video/share/t8eK-8TFsW-Y6WYR2wuGBvVE4xgCsyV8?tab=summary&timestamp=1226.0)

## Topics

### CMS Migration and Redirects

  - [45 articles to be migrated to new CMS](https://fathom.video/share/t8eK-8TFsW-Y6WYR2wuGBvVE4xgCsyV8?tab=summary&timestamp=200.0)
  - [Google Sheet to be created for tracking 301 redirects](https://fathom.video/share/t8eK-8TFsW-Y6WYR2wuGBvVE4xgCsyV8?tab=summary&timestamp=262.0)
  - [New CMS folders needed for services like appointment scheduling](https://fathom.video/share/t8eK-8TFsW-Y6WYR2wuGBvVE4xgCsyV8?tab=summary&timestamp=305.0)
  - [Considering a "Resources" category in footer with dropdown for scalability](https://fathom.video/share/t8eK-8TFsW-Y6WYR2wuGBvVE4xgCsyV8?tab=summary&timestamp=340.0)

### Content Publication and Performance

  - [78 articles in pipeline; 44 published, 20 on hold](https://fathom.video/share/t8eK-8TFsW-Y6WYR2wuGBvVE4xgCsyV8?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [15 articles indexed, generating 3000 impressions and 9 clicks in first week](https://fathom.video/share/t8eK-8TFsW-Y6WYR2wuGBvVE4xgCsyV8?tab=summary&timestamp=673.0)
  - [Appointment scheduling and answering service articles performing well](https://fathom.video/share/t8eK-8TFsW-Y6WYR2wuGBvVE4xgCsyV8?tab=summary&timestamp=687.0)
  - [Content refreshes (20 done, 20 upcoming) showing improved impressions (1600 vs 800 avg) and position (16 vs 20 avg)](https://fathom.video/share/t8eK-8TFsW-Y6WYR2wuGBvVE4xgCsyV8?tab=summary&timestamp=722.0)

### Content Strategy

  - [Plan to support programmatic articles with generic blog posts (e.g., "What is an Answering Service?")](https://fathom.video/share/t8eK-8TFsW-Y6WYR2wuGBvVE4xgCsyV8?tab=summary&timestamp=1011.0)
  - [Considering salon industry as potential ICP, awaiting confirmation on enterprise-level focus](https://fathom.video/share/t8eK-8TFsW-Y6WYR2wuGBvVE4xgCsyV8?tab=summary&timestamp=1083.0)
  - [Enterprise section needs refinement; multiple layout options presented (dropdown menus, industry-specific pages)](https://fathom.video/share/t8eK-8TFsW-Y6WYR2wuGBvVE4xgCsyV8?tab=summary&timestamp=1226.0)

### Team Updates

  - [Dave Capone introduced as new managing director with 20+ years SEO experience](https://fathom.video/share/t8eK-8TFsW-Y6WYR2wuGBvVE4xgCsyV8?tab=summary&timestamp=96.0)
  - [Kyle offered CRO expertise for enterprise section refinement](https://fathom.video/share/t8eK-8TFsW-Y6WYR2wuGBvVE4xgCsyV8?tab=summary&timestamp=1313.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Prateek to migrate 45 articles to new CMS and create Google Sheet for 301 redirects](https://fathom.video/share/t8eK-8TFsW-Y6WYR2wuGBvVE4xgCsyV8?tab=summary&timestamp=262.0)
  - [Daniel to create new CMS folders as requested](https://fathom.video/share/t8eK-8TFsW-Y6WYR2wuGBvVE4xgCsyV8?tab=summary&timestamp=305.0)
  - [Team to explore and propose scalable navigation solution for growing content categories](https://fathom.video/share/t8eK-8TFsW-Y6WYR2wuGBvVE4xgCsyV8?tab=summary&timestamp=340.0)
  - [Prateek to start publishing held articles and continue with content refreshes](https://fathom.video/share/t8eK-8TFsW-Y6WYR2wuGBvVE4xgCsyV8?tab=summary&timestamp=638.0)
  - [Daniel to consult with Bob on ICP prioritization for enterprise focus](https://fathom.video/share/t8eK-8TFsW-Y6WYR2wuGBvVE4xgCsyV8?tab=summary&timestamp=1682.0)
  - [Team to revisit and refine enterprise section layout and content structure](https://fathom.video/share/t8eK-8TFsW-Y6WYR2wuGBvVE4xgCsyV8?tab=summary&timestamp=1226.0)
